highlights.description: Discord voice channel support with join/leave, audio streaming, and auto-follow
Telegram inline keyboards and Web App integration

added.description: Discord voice channel support with `VoiceManager` for join/leave, audio send/receive, and state tracking
Discord voice configuration: channel allowlist/blocklist, auto-follow users, auto-leave empty channels
Discord voice events: `EventTypeVoiceJoin`, `EventTypeVoiceLeave`, `EventTypeVoiceMove`, `EventTypeVoiceSpeaker`
Telegram inline keyboard buttons with URL, callback, Web App, and inline query support
Telegram Web App data handler for mini-app responses
Telegram localized bot commands with `SetLocalizedCommands`
Telegram metadata: `telegram_inline_keyboard`, `telegram_disable_preview`, `telegram_disable_notification`, `telegram_protect_content`
Slack metadata: `slack_unfurl_links`, `slack_unfurl_media`, `slack_reply_broadcast`
WhatsApp newsletter support with `GetNewsletters`, `FollowNewsletter`, `UnfollowNewsletter`
WhatsApp emoji reactions with `SendReaction` and `RemoveReaction`
WhatsApp chat types: `ChatTypeNewsletter` and `ChatTypeStatus` for channels and status broadcasts
WhatsApp image, video, and document media download handling

documentation.description: Discord voice channel documentation with configuration, events, and audio examples
Telegram inline keyboard and Web App documentation
Slack unfurl controls and reply broadcast documentation
Provider feature matrix updated with new capabilities

highlights.description: Gmail provider migrated to omni-google for unified Google ecosystem support

changed.description: Gmail provider now wraps `omni-google/omnichat/gmail` instead of inline implementation

dependencies.description: Remove direct dependency on `github.com/grokify/gogoogle` (now indirect via omni-google)
Remove direct dependency on `github.com/grokify/goauth` (now indirect via omni-google)

highlights.description: Twilio SMS provider for omnichat integration

added.description: Twilio SMS provider using `omni-twilio/omnichat` for SMS messaging

fixed.description: Handle `socketClient.Ack` errors in Slack event handler instead of silently discarding

documentation.description: Apply PlexusOne unified theme with dark mode and navigation header

highlights.description: IRC provider for channel and direct message support

added.description: IRC provider using ergochat/irc-go v0.6.0 with TLS, NickServ auth, and multi-channel support

highlights.description: Gmail and Slack providers for expanded platform support
MkDocs documentation site with comprehensive guides

added.description: Gmail provider for email integration via gogoogle v0.9.0 SendSimple API
Slack provider with Socket Mode for real-time events

documentation.description: MkDocs site with Material theme and provider guides
README Features section with provider table

infrastructure.description: Update to shared GitHub Actions workflows

highlights.description: Organization rename from agentplexus to plexusone

tests.description: Router tests for `containsURL` and `ProcessWithVoice` covering response modes and URL detection

highlights.description: Voice message support with transcription and synthesis integration

added.description: `VoiceProcessor` interface for STT/TTS integration with `TranscribeAudio`, `SynthesizeSpeech`, and `ResponseMode` methods
`ProcessWithVoice` router handler for voice-enabled message processing
WhatsApp audio message download via whatsmeow `Download` method
WhatsApp audio message upload and send with PTT (Push-to-Talk) flag for voice notes
Automatic URL detection in responses to include text alongside voice for clickable links
Support for `MediaTypeVoice` and `MediaTypeAudio` in WhatsApp provider

highlights.description: Unified Go interface for messaging platforms with Discord, Telegram, and WhatsApp providers
Multi-provider message routing with pattern matching
WhatsApp support via whatsmeow with QR code authentication and SQLite session persistence

added.description: `Provider` interface with Connect, Disconnect, Send, OnMessage, OnEvent methods
`StreamingProvider` interface for typing indicators and streaming messages
`IncomingMessage` and `OutgoingMessage` types with media attachment support
`Router` for multi-provider message routing with pattern matching
Route patterns: `All()`, `DMOnly()`, `GroupOnly()`, `FromProviders()`
`providertest` package with conformance test helpers for provider implementations
Discord provider using discordgo with guild, DM, and thread support
Telegram provider using telebot with group, channel, and private message support
WhatsApp provider using whatsmeow with QR code authentication
SQLite session persistence for WhatsApp using pure Go driver (no CGO)
Echo bot example demonstrating multi-provider usage

documentation.description: README with installation, quick start, and provider examples

infrastructure.description: GitHub Actions lint workflow with golangci-lint
